reason: Browser use feature works correctly - agent successfully opens a browser, navigates to a URL, retrieves the page title, and reports back with the correct information mentioning "Example Domain"
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Page loaded successfully showing Super Agent interface with agent list in sidebar
Found and clicked "QA-20260419-123510-44rh" agent in sidebar - Agent chat interface opened successfully
Typed message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." in message input - Message typed correctly in the input box
Clicked Send message button - Message sent successfully, agent status changed to "working", new session "Browser Page Title Lookup" created
Waited up to 3 minutes for response - Agent completed in 7 seconds, response received with "The page title is Example Domain"
Verified response mentions "Example Domain" - Response clearly states "The page title is Example Domain." confirming the browser successfully navigated to the URL and retrieved the correct page title
